title: DHFWS Dharwad Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Medical Officer, Lab Technician Posts
description: The District Health and Family Welfare Society Dharwad (DHFWS Dharwad) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 15 Medical Officers, Nursing Officer, Lab Technician, and Health Inspecting Officer Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, B.Sc Nursing, 12th, 10th pass, and GNM can apply for the DHFWS Dharwad Jobs 2026 . The interested applica...
